channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Voters react to Gov Tim Walz dodging Tiananmen Square question: 'I'm a knucklehead at times'
item.description: A focus group of voters were skeptical of Gov. Tim Walz's explanation for falsely claiming to have been in Hong Kong during the Tiananmen Square massacre.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Walz’s account of son’s brush with gun violence offers poignant moment in VP debate
item.description: “Look, I’ve got a 17-year-old and he witnessed a shooting at a community center playing volleyball,” Walz said during the debate, referencing his son Gus. “Those things don’t leave you.
item.dc:creator: Sam Stroozas, MPR News

item.title: Walz repeats Georgia abortion death falsehood decried by doctors as 'fearmongering'
item.description: Tim Walz claimed during the vice presidential debate that a Georgia woman likely died due to the state's abortion laws despite doctors slamming the narrative as "fearmongering.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vance and Walz keep it civil in a policy-heavy discussion: VP debate takeaways
item.description: Vice presidential nominees JD Vance and Tim Walz have used their time on the debate stage to focus the bulk of their attacks not on one another, but on those at the top of their rival tickets.
item.dc:creator: Bill Barrow, Zeke Miller And Nicholas Riccardi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump says he would veto national abortion ban
item.description: Former President Trump on Tuesday said he would veto a federal abortion ban if it made it to his desk in a potential second term after previously refusing to say whether he would do so.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: What to know on claims made about Minnesota, Walz in VP debate against Vance
item.description: Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz’s home state came up early in his debate against fellow vice presidential candidate JD Vance on Tuesday evening. Here are the facts.
item.dc:creator: MPR News Staff, MPR News

item.title: Trump takes lead over Harris in North Carolina Quinnipiac survey
item.description: The poll offers much better news for Trump than last month’s poll from Quinnipiac, which found Harris leading Trump by 3 points.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Get to know the candidates: We sent participants in the 22nd Congressional District Debate a questionnaire. Here’s how they responded
item.description: Each candidate participating in Wednesday's 22nd Congressional Debate responded to our questionnaire.
item.dc:creator: Jacqueline Gutierrez, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: JD Vance, Tim Walz face off in 2024 VP debate: Key takeaways
item.description: Republican J.D. Vance and Democrat Tim Walz met Tuesday in the lone vice presidential debate of the 2024 election, bringing together undercards who have spent two months going after each other and the opposing nominees who top the major-party tickets.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, Fox 5

item.title: Trump speaks in Wisconsin ahead of VP debate
item.description: The former president criticized Kamala Harris and Joe Biden for their handling of the conflict in the Middle East and the border.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Florida Republican 'absolutely certain' there will be supplemental to address Helene aid
item.description: Rep. Kat Cammack (R-Fla.) said Monday she’s “absolutely certain” Congress will consider a supplemental aid package to provide additional disaster relief to areas devastated by Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Walz and Vance go in depth on policy while attacking each other’s running mates in VP debate
item.description: In a debate that evoked a calmer era in American politics, Tim Walz and JD Vance on Tuesday went after each other’s running mates and sought to shore up their campaigns' vulnerabilities at a time of renewed fears of a regional war in the Middle East and sadness over devastation from Hurricane Helene
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price And Chris Megerian, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Rick Scott calls for Senate to reconvene to consider Helene disaster aid
item.description: Sen. Rick Scott (R-Fla.) on Monday called for the Senate to “immediately reconvene” once damage assessments are completed so lawmakers can consider an emergency aid package in response to the devastation left by Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, NewsNation

item.title: Trump suggests ‘1 rough hour’ of policing would end retail crime
item.description: The former president called for law enforcement to be freed up to "do their job" without restrictions.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Harris and Trump change their campaign plans after Hurricane Helene's destruction
item.description: Hurricane Helene is scrambling the presidential candidates' plans this week. Democratic nominee Kamala Harris is cutting short a campaign visit to Las Vegas to return to Washington for briefings. Republican candidate Donald Trump is heading to Georgia to see the storm's impact.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, JILL COLVIN and CHRISTINE FERNANDO, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lawmakers fear 'chaos' if Trump-Harris race goes to the wire
item.description: Lawmakers in both parties are bracing themselves for a messy aftermath to Election Day as polls show the race between former President Trump and Vice President Harris is so close in several battleground states that it could take days to determine the winner.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: 5 people killed in a 4-vehicle chain reaction crash on central Utah highway
item.description: Four people from Minnesota and a Utah man were killed in a four-vehicle chain reaction crash in central Utah. The Utah Highway Patrol says an SUV pulling onto U.S. Highway 6 near Price overshot the acceleration lane and pulled into the path of a semitractor pulling double trailers.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Harris trolls Trump at Vegas rally and LA fundraiser, says her crowds are 'pretty big'
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris poked at Donald Trump over crowd sizes, his refusal to debate again and his privileged background on Sunday as she hauled in campaign cash in California and held a raucous rally at the same Nevada venue where the Republican nominee had appeared just two
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Exploring the Eric Adams indictment for bribery, wire fraud, and solicitating contributions from Turkish nationals
item.description: New York City Mayor Eric Adams pleaded not guilty in a federal bribery case after being indicted on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Johan Sheridan, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Prop. 36 faces intense review as North County residents gather for informative session
item.description: Voters have a lot to consider this upcoming election when it comes to Proposition 36, a statewide ballot measure that seeks a tougher approach on crime.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Franco, Fox 5
